name: plugin-template
description: A complete skeleton plugin demonstrating every capability
_comment_skills: Default: ./skills/ — only override if using a non-standard path
_comment_agents: Default: ./agents/ — only override if using a non-standard path
_comment_commands: Array of paths to command markdown files or directories
_comment_hooks: Default: ./hooks/hooks.json is auto-loaded. Only set this for ADDITIONAL hook files
_comment_mcpServers: Can be inline (object) or a path to a JSON file
_comment_outputStyles: Directory containing custom output style definitions
_comment_lspServers: Can be inline (object) or reference .lsp.json at plugin root
